title: 10 best herbal creams for acne
description: Calendula officinalis, also known as pot marigold, creams helps with acne because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's active compounds, such as triterpenoids and carotenoids, work to reduce redness and swelling associated with acne. Calendula cream's soothing and moisturizing effects also help to calm irritated skin, promoting a healthy balance of the skin's natural flora.
